visual-anti-patterns.notes: Purple-to-blue gradient hero on landing page; body/metadata text appears sub-16px in several places (gallery byline, category tabs, environment labels); gallery shows card-inside-card nesting (thumbnail container within outer card); builder shows 7 distinct UI groups at once (nav, object categories, object grid, 3D canvas, environment bar, AI panel, chat input)

visual-child-friendly.notes: Playful tone throughout with emoji, friendly AI buddy with suggestion chips, big CTA buttons on landing, whimsical environment names; slightly dense builder UI with small category tabs prevents a 5

visual-consistency.notes: DreamWorld branding and rounded card shapes are consistent, but button styles drift across pages (orange/teal on landing, purple on gallery, mixed in builder) and the landing gradient aesthetic clashes with the builder's clean white style

visual-accessibility.notes: Most text areas show adequate contrast and inputs have visible focus borders; text labels accompany most interactive elements, but some top-bar icons lack labels and no evidence of responsive layout adaptation
